3223080.name: Kirin's Chosen
3223080.description: Travel through an Asian-inspired world in this roguelite deckbuilder. As the chosen warrior of the mythical Kirin, you must defeat the four other champions of the mythical beasts and bring harmony back to the land. Encounter enemies on your travels around the mystical world of Nuwa while managing the unique 3-slot combat system in fast-paced, fully animated battles. Learn powerful moves from your defeated foes as you attempt to construct a strong enough deck to take down a rival champion.
3223080.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
